response.justification: Candidate has roughly 14-16 years of solid full-stack and infrastructure engineering experience with broad language exposure, but the role is a Director-level Principal Engineer focused on AI strategy and the resume shows only recent, peripheral AI-agent/MCP tooling work with no demonstrated AI products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise. There is also no evidence of director-level influence, advising strategic customers, or shaping cloud/AI product strategy at the scope this role requires.
strengths: ~15 years of polyglot software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial initiative
Public speaking, workshops, and teaching demonstrate ability to share insights externally
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise
No evidence of director-level IC scope, strategic advisory, or influencing cloud product direction
Cloud experience is limited (some AWS CDK); lacks deep cloud-platform builder credentials

key_factors.factor: Lack of AI expertise and AI-built products
Breadth of engineering experience and entrepreneurial track record
